# Précis-MCP

> Self-hostable, read-only financial-model access over the Model Context
> Protocol: a metric engine driven by a declarative YAML catalogue over a SQL
> semantic layer in ClickHouse, with ingestion, OAuth 2.1 identity, profiles,
> backups, and an MCP tool surface for AI clients. The open core of the
> Précis platform.

Read "How Précis-MCP works" first — it defines the vocabulary (scenario,
domain, dimension, binding, profile, instance directory) the rest assumes.
All numbers come from the operator's own model: the `instance/` directory
(catalogue YAML + semantic SQL) defines what exists; the engine refuses to
serve an inconsistent model.

## Getting started

- [How Précis-MCP works](getting-started/concepts/): the moving parts, the
  federated-read split, and the vocabulary table
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart/): single-user local server with
  the populated demo model in ~15 minutes (Docker, dev key)

## Configuration

- [Catalogue & semantic model](configuration/catalogue-and-semantic/): the
  two-layer model walkthrough — SQL views for meaning, YAML for exposure
- [Adding metrics & dimensions](configuration/adding-metrics-and-dimensions/):
  the change contract — invariants, federated-domain limits, traps, checklist
- [ClickHouse schema contract](configuration/clickhouse-schema-contract/):
  the databases, tables, views, and scenario registry a ready cluster holds
- [Ingestion & data sources](configuration/ingestion/): sources, bindings,
  extract→validate→atomic swap, scheduling, load verification
- [User profiles & permissions](configuration/user-profiles/): scenario
  patterns → roles → domain/dimension scope, with composable examples
- [Environment variable reference](configuration/environment-variables/):
  every knob

## Deployment

- [Remote access — sign-in & identity modes](deployment/oauth-keycloak/):
  dev key / bundled Keycloak / direct OIDC, and user provisioning
- [Corporate IdP via Keycloak brokering](deployment/keycloak-brokering/):
  the SSO walkthrough, including DCR-surface hardening
- [External IdP recipes](deployment/external-idp-recipes/): Auth0, Okta,
  Entra ID, Ping — per-IdP steps and env blocks
- [ClickHouse data modes](deployment/clickhouse-data-modes/): bundled vs
  bring-your-own, provisioning presets
- [Security model](deployment/security-model/): the trust model — read-only
  enforcement, authn/authz layers, exposure surfaces, audit trail
- [Production deployment checklist](deployment/production-checklist/): the
  first-run checklist for a hardened multi-user deployment

## Excel

- [Précis for Excel](excel/): hosted read-only workbook functions served from
  `/excel`, OAuth client setup, and install steps
- [Function reference](excel/functions/): every `PRECIS.*` function, arguments,
  and examples

## Operations

- [Onboarding a data source](operations/onboarding-ingestion/): the
  end-to-end runbook for wiring a dataset
- [Backups & restore](operations/backups/): declarative backup bundles,
  restore, drills
- [Rotating credentials](operations/rotating-credentials/): rotating
  database, JWT, and API secrets without downtime
- [Upgrading](operations/upgrades/): changelog-first upgrade procedure;
  rollback is restore-from-backup
- [Observability](operations/observability/): emitted spans/metrics/logs,
  collector wiring, alerting on failed loads
- [Troubleshooting](operations/troubleshooting/): symptom-indexed, verbatim
  error strings

## Reference

- [MCP tool reference](reference/mcp-tools/): every advertised tool, its
  parameters, variants, and scoping conventions
- [Adding read tools](development/adding-read-tools/): the developer
  contract for extending the tool surface
